summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Zymly Portfolio Web application. Backend APIs working excellently (92.9% success rate), frontend fully functional with responsive design, admin panel operational, and contact form integration working.

minor_issues.issue: Create flavor endpoint returns 200 instead of expected 201
Flavor selectors not loading properly on mobile view

design_observations.issue: Images show 'Wild Bay Kombucha' branding instead of Zymly products

passed_tests: Home page loads with hero, features, and featured flavors sections
Natural Flavors page shows all 5 flavors with interactive selection (desktop)
Our Mission and About Us pages load correctly
Contact form submission works and stores in database
Admin login with correct credentials (admin@zymly.in / ZymlyAdmin2024!)
Admin dashboard shows navigation and quick actions
Navigation between all pages works correctly
Mobile responsive design (375px width) - most components
Contact form email integration via Resend API
All 5 expected flavors present: Simply Lemon, Ginger Lemon, Cinne Pineapple, Tangy Orange, Berry Bliss
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fixes needed: (1) Update status code expectation for flavor creation endpoint, (2) Fix mobile flavor selectors loading issue, (3) Replace placeholder images with actual Zymly product images on Mission/About pages
